headline: Phillips 66 (PSX) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Mark E. Lashier: Geopolitical events in the Middle East drove unprecedented commodity price volatility during the quarter.  In the face of this volatility, we remain focused on operational excellence.  Additionally, we have global placement optionality through our commercial organization.

content.title: Phillips 66 (PSX) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
content.summary: Mark E. Lashier: Geopolitical events in the Middle East drove unprecedented commodity price volatility during the quarter.  In the face of this volatility, we remain focused on operational excellence.  Additionally, we have global placement optionality through our commercial organization.
